goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should 'arrive by 08:30'.
The train should go to 'stansted airport' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should arrive by 08:30
The train should go to stansted airport and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get departure time
